_comment: StackChan agent-status display config. Hot-reloaded on mtime change. Maps OpenClaw session activity to body cues (LEDs/face/nod). NO speech ever.

poll._notes: RUNNING is detected from transcript file mtimes (appended live mid-turn), because sessions-list updatedAt only refreshes at turn boundaries. The CLI roster supplies session keys + abortedLastRun for the ERROR cue. A previously-running session quiet for done_quiet_ms (with nothing else running) fires DONE. exclude_agents keeps Esmeralda's (companion) private store untouched.

idle._notes: Very dim teal so 'status display alive' is distinguishable from LEDs hard-off. Set 0/0/0 to go dark.

running._notes: Slow blue breath: alternates low/high every pulse_step_seconds while any session is active. One LED call per step; keep >=2s to avoid spamming the body.

done._notes: Brief green + happy + (rate-limited) small nod on running->quiet edge, then back to idle. event_cooldown stops back-to-back cron sessions from strobing green.

waiting._notes: OpenClaw has no CLI to query pending approvals, so waiting-on-user is a touch-file hook: `touch waiting.flag` when an agent needs input, remove it when answered. Flags older than stale_seconds are ignored and deleted.

voice_ack._notes: Voice-ack is the PRIMARY dismiss path (2026-07-19): say a keyword during a green/amber cue to clear it. Works across a fan-noisy office where the tiny Si12T head pads are unreliable. Keyword-gated (substring match) so whisper ambient-noise hallucinations do not false-ack; ignore lists known noise hallucinations to explicitly drop. When enabled, each ack poll does a ~listen_seconds mic capture INSTEAD of a touch poll (never both, to bound gateway load). Set enabled false to revert to touch-only. Tune keywords to taste; avoid bare okay/yes/thanks (too easily hallucinated from fans).

ack._ack_surface_notes: head (Si12T) is the only working ack surface as of 2026-07-19. screen/both are reserved for future once LCD-touch has an MCP verb — stackchan-mcp 0.10.0 does NOT expose one; LCD taps are swallowed by firmware ToggleChatState (start/stop listen). See README LCD-touch gap section.
ack._notes: Tap-to-acknowledge: after a done/waiting cue fires, get_touch_state is polled every poll_interval_seconds for up to timeout_seconds (max ~30 polls per cue — NEVER at idle; see the 2026-07-16 reflex-daemon postmortem). A head tap/stroke clears the cue to idle immediately, appends a JSON line to log_path, and (for waiting) removes waiting.flag. NOTE: with ack enabled the done cue holds green up to timeout_seconds instead of hold_seconds; disable here to restore the old 5s hold. poll_interval_seconds has a hard floor of 2s in code. grace_seconds: taps up to this long BEFORE the window opened still count (the done cue plays face/LED/nod ~2s before the window opens — 2026-07-19 fix). touch_debug: logs every raw touch response + threshold decision to watcher.log during ack windows; set false to quiet.

coordination._notes: Presence watcher wins: after it fires a greeting (last_greeting_iso), this daemon sends no cues for defer_after_greeting_seconds. On gateway/body errors, cue sends pause for gateway_backoff_seconds (state machine keeps running).
